query: SELECT id, userId, DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as date_formatted, date as date_raw, title FROM diary_entries ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 1grUzB66oStVVFP.root --database gPiHJoB3NKeoE8WP6B5f8y --execute SELECT id, userId, DATE_FORMAT(date, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') as date_formatted, date as date_raw, title FROM diary_entries ORDER BY createdAt DESC LIMIT 5;
